title: Research
subtitle: Niche Explorer — research keywords and competitor ASINs to find untapped opportunities.

locked.title: Niche Explorer is a Pro feature
locked.description: Import competitor data from Publisher Rocket, see BSR-to-revenue estimates, and let Claude analyse niche saturation in one click.

import.hint: Export keyword search results (or a Reverse-ASIN run) from Publisher Rocket → load the CSV here.
import.noFile: No data yet — import a Publisher Rocket CSV or paste rows manually.
import.importEmpty: CSV parsed, but no rows survived the filter (every row had blank ASIN + Title).

manual.title: Manual entry
manual.subtitle: Add competitor books row-by-row when you don't have a Publisher Rocket export.

table.title: Top competing books
table.weakCoverHint: Flagged by AI synthesis as a potential opening.
table.noData: No competitors to show. Import a CSV or add a manual row to start.

estimateDisclaimer: BSR-derived estimates are a rough order-of-magnitude guide only — actual revenue depends on price, royalty share, KU borrows, returns, and ads.

synthesis.title: AI synthesis
synthesis.subtitle: Claude analyses the niche and returns saturation, weak covers, and a suggested angle.
synthesis.minRows: Add at least 3 competitor rows before running the analysis.
synthesis.missingKey: Claude API key not configured — set in Settings → AI to enable AI synthesis.
synthesis.parseError: AI returned malformed JSON — try running it again. Raw output: {preview}

projects.title: Saved research
projects.savedAtSuffix: {rowCount, plural, one {# row} other {# rows}} · saved {when}
